data.title: reviewer-findings.json: code-reviewer-light agent writes 'dimensions' key -> record-review.sh expects 'scores' key
data.description:
## Incident Overview
When the dso:code-reviewer-light agent writes reviewer-findings.json, it uses the key 'dimensions' for score data (e.g., dimensions.correctness.score). However, record-review.sh validates against a schema that expects the key 'scores' (e.g., scores.correctness as a flat integer).

## Expected Behavior
The reviewer-findings.json schema should be consistent between what the code-reviewer agents write and what record-review.sh validates. Either the agents should write 'scores' or record-review.sh should accept 'dimensions'.

## Actual Behavior
record-review.sh fails with 'ERROR: reviewer missing score dimension: hygiene' because it looks for scores.hygiene but the file has dimensions.hygiene.score. A manual python3 transform is needed to fix the schema before record-review.sh accepts it.
